contracts.name: filesystem
contracts.title: Filesystem
contracts.description: Read/write project files inside an approved workspace only.

contracts.name: shell
contracts.title: Shell
contracts.description: Run shell commands with explicit working directory and bounded scope.

contracts.name: git
contracts.title: Git
contracts.description: Inspect diffs, branches, commits, and status without destructive operations by default.

contracts.name: package-manager
contracts.title: Package Manager
contracts.description: Install and run project dependencies with lockfile awareness.

contracts.name: test-runner
contracts.title: Test Runner
contracts.description: Run unit, integration, smoke, and eval tests.

contracts.name: browser
contracts.title: Browser
contracts.description: Open local or approved web pages for inspection.

contracts.name: web-search
contracts.title: Web Search
contracts.description: Retrieve current external information when allowed.

contracts.name: database
contracts.title: Database
contracts.description: Inspect schemas and run safe read-only queries by default.

contracts.name: docker
contracts.title: Docker
contracts.description: Build and run isolated services with explicit ports and cleanup.

contracts.name: github
contracts.title: GitHub
contracts.description: Read repository data, issues, PRs, and create changes when authorized.

contracts.name: gmail
contracts.title: Gmail
contracts.description: Read or write email only after explicit user intent.

contracts.name: calendar
contracts.title: Calendar
contracts.description: Search and modify events only on explicit user request.

contracts.name: drive
contracts.title: Google Drive
contracts.description: Read and manage Drive files through explicit connector actions.

contracts.name: figma
contracts.title: Figma
contracts.description: Inspect or generate design artifacts through Figma connector actions.

contracts.name: canva
contracts.title: Canva
contracts.description: Create visual assets and presentations through Canva connector actions.

contracts.name: notion
contracts.title: Notion
contracts.description: Read or update workspace docs when authorized.

contracts.name: slack
contracts.title: Slack
contracts.description: Read or post workspace messages only with clear user direction.

contracts.name: linear
contracts.title: Linear
contracts.description: Read or modify product issues with project-specific authorization.

contracts.name: jira
contracts.title: Jira
contracts.description: Read or modify tickets with project-specific authorization.

contracts.name: monitoring
contracts.title: Monitoring
contracts.description: Read logs, metrics, traces, and alerts in bounded scopes.

contracts.name: secrets
contracts.title: Secrets
contracts.description: Read secret metadata only; never print secret values.

contracts.name: artifact-generation
contracts.title: Artifact Generation
contracts.description: Generate files, docs, images, decks, reports, and ZIPs with clear user-facing outputs.
